name: Hendrick's Gin
notes: Quirky, premium gin brand. Gin cocktails are a major category in Spirit Library. COTD sponsorship or ingredient search featuring Hendrick's cocktails.

name: Aviation American Gin
notes: Ryan Reynolds brand, celebrity-owned. Very active on social, known for humor. Cocktail of the Day sponsorship featuring Aviation cocktails.

name: Patrón Tequila
notes: Premium tequila, massive cocktail culture. My Bar ingredient search featuring tequila cocktails. COTD sponsorship.

name: Casamigos
notes: George Clooney/Rande Gerber brand (now Diageo). Celebrity brand with strong social presence. Flavor search + tequila cocktails angle.

name: Don Julio
notes: Ultra-premium tequila. Luxury cocktail angle. COTD featuring Don Julio recipes.

name: Clase Azul
notes: Ultra-premium tequila with artisan bottles. High-end cocktail audience. Luxury cocktail curation angle.

name: Grey Goose Vodka
notes: Premium vodka. Vodka cocktail search is a major category. COTD partnership or ingredient-based recipe feature.

name: Absolut Vodka
notes: Iconic vodka brand with huge social following. Known for creative cocktail campaigns. My Bar + flavored cocktail search.

name: Bombay Sapphire
notes: Premium gin brand, known for cocktail creativity campaigns. Perfect for gin cocktail search feature + COTD sponsorship.

name: Tanqueray
notes: Classic London Dry gin. Large cocktail catalog featuring Tanqueray. Recipe partnership.

name: Woodford Reserve
notes: Premium bourbon, huge cocktail culture. My Bar bourbon search + Bourbon Old Fashioned/Manhattans COTD.

name: Maker's Mark
notes: Iconic wheated bourbon. Strong cocktail brand. COTD featuring Maker's recipes.

name: Jack Daniel's
notes: World's most recognized whiskey brand. Massive audience. Recipe partnership, shopping cart integration for ingredients.

name: Jameson Irish Whiskey
notes: Massive global brand, very cocktail-forward. My Bar whiskey search + Irish coffee and whiskey sour recipes.

name: Bacardi Rum
notes: Largest spirits company. Rum cocktails are a major Spirit Library category. Partnership for tropical/rum cocktail section.

name: Captain Morgan
notes: Hugely popular spiced rum brand. Rum cocktail search feature + COTD.

name: Aperol
notes: Aperol Spritz is iconic. Flavor-forward search (citrus, effervescent, bitter) maps perfectly to Aperol cocktails. Summer season angle.

name: Campari
notes: Bitter liqueur at the heart of Negroni and other classics. Negroni is one of the most searched cocktails. COTD and flavor search (bitter) partnership.

name: St-Germain Elderflower Liqueur
notes: Premium floral liqueur. Floral flavor tag in Spirit Library. Upscale cocktail audience. Flavor search by 'Floral' tag.

name: Cointreau
notes: Premium triple sec, in hundreds of cocktail recipes. Used in Margarita, Cosmopolitan, Sidecar. Ingredient search showing all Cointreau cocktails.

name: Fever-Tree
notes: Premium mixers (tonic, ginger beer, soda). HUGE fit — My Bar ingredient search shows what you can make with Fever-Tree tonic. Shopping cart integration (buy Fever-Tree tonic from recipe). Direct revenue alignment.

name: Q Mixers
notes: Premium mixers, strong cocktail culture. Same angle as Fever-Tree — ingredient search + shopping cart.

name: Fentimans
notes: Botanical premium mixers. Herbal/botanical flavor search angle. My Bar integration.

name: Angostura Bitters
notes: World's most used bitters. In hundreds of Spirit Library recipes. Ingredient search showing every Angostura recipe. Endemic brand partnership.

name: Scrappy's Bitters
notes: Craft bitters brand. Ingredient search for craft cocktail builders. My Bar + shopping cart.

name: Laphroaig
notes: Iconic peated Scotch whisky. Smoky flavor tag in Spirit Library — search by 'Smoky'. Premium audience. Scotch cocktail section partnership.

name: Del Maguey Mezcal
notes: Pioneer single-village mezcal brand. Smoky/Spirit-forward flavor tags. Mezcal is an emerging Spirit Library category — partnership to grow it.

name: Monin Syrups
notes: Leading flavor syrups brand. Ingredient search showing all Monin-compatible recipes. Shopping cart integration — buy Monin syrups directly from recipes.

name: Torani Syrups
notes: Mass-market flavor syrups. Huge overlap with cocktail home bartenders. Ingredient search + shopping cart purchase angle.

name: 1800 Tequila
notes: Popular tequila with heavy cocktail culture marketing. My Bar + flavor search partnership.

name: Espolòn Tequila
notes: Artistic tequila brand, strong cocktail culture. Flavor search + cocktail-forward content partnership.

name: Malört
notes: Cult Chicago bitter liqueur with a wild following. Bitter/Herbal flavor tags. Niche but very engaged audience — great UGC opportunity.

name: Forthave Spirits
notes: Brooklyn craft spirits. Herbal/amaro category in Spirit Library. Craft spirits discovery via My Bar.

name: Rémy Martin
notes: Premium cognac. Brandy/cognac cocktail category in Spirit Library. Luxury audience. COTD featuring cognac classics.

name: Hennessy
notes: World's best-selling cognac, enormous following. Cognac cocktail category + cultural tie-ins. Partnership for premium cocktail curation.

name: Patrón Spirits Company (Corp)
notes: Corporate pitch to Bacardi for multi-brand Spirit Library partnership across Patrón, Grey Goose, Bombay Sapphire, St-Germain, etc.
